workflow.name: Send AI pet grooming reminders and follow-ups with GPT-4o mini, Twilio, email, Google Sheets and Slack
workflow.description:
# Pet Grooming Appointment & Client Engagement Automation

Automate reminders, follow-ups, and client engagement for your pet grooming business with this simple n8n workflow by Hyrum Hurst, AI Automation Engineer at QuarterSmart.

- Sends personalized SMS and email reminders with grooming prep tips
- Tracks client confirmations and responses in Google Sheets
- Notifies groomers of daily schedules via Slack
- Sends post-appointment thank-you or reschedule messages
- Compiles weekly engagement reports automatically

Perfect for pet groomers looking to reduce no-shows, increase client satisfaction, and save time. Combines AI, Slack, Google Sheets, SMS, and Email for end-to-end automation.

**Author:** Hyrum Hurst, AI Automation Engineer  
**Company:** QuarterSmart  
**Contact:** hyrum@quartersmart.com

**Keywords:** pet grooming automation, AI reminders, appointment automation, client engagement

assignments.name: groomingInstructions
assignments.value: Please ensure your pet is clean and dry before the appointment. Avoid feeding 2 hours before grooming.

values.content: =Generate a friendly, personalized appointment reminder SMS for {{ $json.clientName }}. Their {{ $json.petType }} grooming appointment is tomorrow ({{ $json.appointmentDate }}) at {{ $json.appointmentTime }}. Keep it under 160 characters, warm and professional.

parameters.text:
=Hi {{ $json.clientName }},

Your {{ $json.petType }} grooming appointment is tomorrow at {{ $json.appointmentTime }}!

Prep Instructions:
{{ $('Workflow Configuration').first().json.groomingInstructions }}

See you soon!
Your Grooming Team
parameters.subject: =Grooming Prep Instructions for {{ $json.petType }} - Tomorrow!

parameters.text:
=Hi {{ $json.clientName }},

Thank you for bringing {{ $json.petType }} to our grooming salon! We hope you loved the results.

We'd love to see you again soon. Book your next appointment anytime!

Best regards,
Your Grooming Team
parameters.subject: Thank You for Visiting Us!

parameters.text:
=Hi {{ $json.clientName }},

We noticed you weren't able to make your grooming appointment. No worries!

Reschedule anytime using this link:
{{ $('Workflow Configuration').first().json.rescheduleUrl }}

We look forward to pampering {{ $json.petType }} soon!

Best regards,
Your Grooming Team
parameters.subject: We Missed You - Reschedule Your Grooming Appointment

assignments.name: summary
assignments.value: =This week we had {{ $input.all().length }} client interactions including appointment reminders, confirmations, and follow-ups.

parameters.text:
=📊 *{{ $json.reportTitle }}*
_{{ $json.reportDate }}_

{{ $json.summary }}

Total Interactions: *{{ $json.totalInteractions }}*

Keep up the great work! 🐾

parameters.content:
## Main
Automates pet grooming appointment reminders, personalized engagement, and team notifications. Clients are reminded, groomers are updated, and follow-ups are automated.

## Setup
1. Connect Google Sheets for appointment data.
2. Add SMS and Email nodes for client communication.
3. Connect Slack to notify groomers.
4. Add OpenAI API key for personalized messages.
5. Customize messages and instructions to match your brand.
For assistance, contact Hyrum Hurst at hyrum@quartersmart.com

user.name: Hyrum Hurst
user.bio: Google Certified AI Automations Engineer, Agentic Workflow Specalist

data.details:
The IF node can be used to implement binary conditional logic in your workflow. You can set up one-to-many conditions to evaluate each item of data being inputted into the node. That data will either evaluate to TRUE or FALSE and route out of the node accordingly.

This node has multiple types of conditions: Bool, String, Number, and Date & Time.
